expectations.evidence: src/main/java/com/example/app/config/TurboDocxConfig.java exists as a TurboSign config file
TurboDocxConfig.java creates client using Builder pattern: new TurboDocxClient.Builder().apiKey(apiKey).orgId(orgId).senderEmail(senderEmail).senderName(senderName).build()
.env contains TURBODOCX_API_KEY and TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL; application.properties references them via ${TURBODOCX_API_KEY} and ${TURBODOCX_SENDER_EMAIL}
No file contains partner API key variables (TURBODOCX_PARTNER_API_KEY or partner-api-key) anywhere in the project
Files placed in src/main/java/com/example/app/ with proper package structure (config/, controller/)
All generated files use .java extension (TurboDocxConfig.java, SignatureController.java, Application.java, HealthController.java)
